TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_United_arab_emirates, title = United_arab_emirates, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/United_arab_emirates} }

S.FORM: United arab emirates hya' ga cyux maki' tay 24 00 N, 54 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 83,600 sq km (maki' tay 115ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 83,600 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,927,482. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 4.60%, lhlahuy hya' ga 0.038, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 91.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Abu Dhabi. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 2 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, aring ryax 3 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部

United arab emirates hya' ga cyux maki' tay 24 00 N, 54 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 83,600 sq km (maki' tay 115ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 83,600 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 5,927,482. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 4.60%, lhlahuy hya' ga 0.038, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 91.60%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Abu Dhabi. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 2 na tay mawpuw sazing byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, aring ryax 3 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2004 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA 外交部
S.PHON: unite* araβ emirates~ɕ ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azijaʔ s~ɕjuw. kwaraʔ kiŋħʦ~ʨijan nijaʔ **,*** s~ɕq km (makiʔ taj ***ɣinkɣan kin waħʦ~ʨiʔ) (kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ nijaʔ ɣa **,*** s~ɕq km, kinwħʦ~ʨiʔ na laws~ɕajan ws~ɕiluŋ ħjaʔ ɣa * s~ɕq km) kinkħmajan kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq ħjaʔ ɣa *,***,***. pinβʦ~ʨjan naħaʔ s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ rħzjal ħjaʔ ij pqmaħun ħjaʔ ɣa *.**%, lħlaħuj ħjaʔ ɣa *.***, s~ɕniʔ naħaʔ s~ɕa pptzjuwaw s~ɕa βzinaħ ħjaʔ ɣa **.**%. s~ɕpzjaŋ qalaŋ na kokkaʔ s~ɕpzjaŋ naħaʔ kraħuʔ qalaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa aβu *ħaβi. s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ s~ɕnjan kinramat inluŋan na kokkaʔ ħjaʔ ɣa * na taj mawpuw s~ɕaziŋ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ na qutux kawas~ɕ. mrħuw kokkaʔ mrħuw kokkaʔ taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa kħali*a βin zaje* al naħjan, ariŋ rjax * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨia ***
